content:
flowchart TD
    A[IF Metabolic Benefit Observed] --> B{Mechanism?}
    B -->|Pure Caloric Restriction| C["Timing Incidental"]
    B -->|Pure Circadian Alignment| D["Calorie-Independent Benefit"]
    B -->|Synergistic/Additive 9| E["Both Axes Contribute"]
    C --> F["Predicted: IF equals CER at same kcal"]
    D --> G["Predicted: Window matters at fixed kcal"]
    E --> H["Predicted: Window + kcal both matter"]
    I[Short-term 8-10h window benefit 5] -.consistent with.-> C
    I -.consistent with.-> D
    I -.consistent with.-> E
    J[Matched-calorie trial needed] -.required to arbitrate.-> B
    K[Adherence loss over time 11] --> L[Real-world benefit < supervised]
